_comment: Hand-curated Requirement objects matching the spec. Used by `eval --static-only` so the harness can be exercised without LLM keys. When the harness runs --full, this file is ignored and the LLM extractor produces requirements directly.

requirements.title: Pressure regulation tolerance
requirements.statement: The pump controller shall regulate the hydraulic line pressure within ±2 bar of the commanded setpoint during nominal operation.

requirements.title: Pressure loop cycle time
requirements.statement: The controller shall complete a pressure-loop cycle in less than 8 ms under nominal CPU load.

requirements.title: Pressure telemetry rate
requirements.statement: The controller should report current pressure to the platform bus at a rate of 50 Hz.

requirements.title: Over-pressure protection
requirements.statement: The over-pressure protection circuit shall trip when measured line pressure exceeds 285 bar for more than 100 ms.

requirements.title: Safe state entry time
requirements.statement: The controller shall enter the SAFE state within 50 ms of detecting a solenoid drive fault.

requirements.title: Safety event logging
requirements.statement: The controller shall log all DAL-B safety events to non-volatile memory.

requirements.title: Power-on built-in test
requirements.statement: The power-on built-in test (PBIT) shall complete in less than 3 seconds and report PASS/FAIL on the maintenance discrete output.

requirements.title: Communication recovery
requirements.statement: The controller shall always recover from a transient communication loss within an appropriate time.

requirements.title: CAN-FD interface
requirements.statement: The CAN-FD interface should be implemented and the message framing shall conform to the platform ICD revision TBD.

requirements.title: Fault handling
requirements.statement: The controller shall handle every fault condition.

requirements.title: DO-178C compliance
requirements.statement: The software shall be developed under DO-178C objectives appropriate for DAL-B.
